summary: Backend-only testing for MediCore AI: ran 32 pytest tests covering health/auth/roles/CRUD/admin/portal/role-enforcement against external https URL. All 32 tests PASSED (100% success).

minor.issue: Spec said POST but server only exposes GET. Tests handle both; main agent should align spec or add POST alias.
GET handler seeds default drugs if collection is empty (server.py L1428-1445). This duplicates seed.py logic and could re-populate after intentional wipes. Recommend removing the inline seed.
DUPLICATE route definitions: POST/GET /reports declared twice (lines 1321 and 1717). Second registration overrides first; consolidate.

action_items: Remove duplicate @api_router.post('/reports') and @api_router.get('/reports') blocks at lines 1717+ (server.py)
Remove inline drug auto-seed in GET /api/medicine/drugs (server.py L1428-1445) - seed.py already handles this
Optional: add POST alias for /api/portal/me to match spec, or update spec to GET
Consider splitting server.py (2200 lines) into modules: auth.py, patients.py, ehr.py, reports.py, admin.py, etc.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2200 lines - violates the <700 line rule. Split into routers per domain.
Duplicate @api_router.post('/reports') and GET '/reports' definitions (lines 1321 vs 1717) - the second silently overrides the first; risk of subtle bugs.
GET /api/medicine/drugs auto-seeds default drugs into DB if empty - hidden side-effect inside a read endpoint; remove since seed.py already populates.
CORS allows '*' with allow_credentials=True - browsers will reject, and it's insecure. Tighten to known origins from env.
os.getenv() uses default fallback strings for SECRET_KEY/MONGO_URL/DB_NAME - per env-var policy these should fail fast if missing.
Multiple inline 'import' statements scattered throughout functions (datetime, hashlib, etc.) - hoist to module top.
ObjectId handling done via fix_id() helper - good; no _id leaked in tested responses.
test_credentials: All users password: Password123!. Admin: admin@medicore.ai, Doctor: lida@medicore.ai, Radiologist: sofia@medicore.ai, Lab tech: lab@medicore.ai, Receptionist: reception@medicore.ai, Patient: sarah@example.com. /app/memory/test_credentials.md is MISSING - main agent should create it.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing seed populated by /app/backend/seed.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional at https://permission-mapper-4.preview.emergentagent.com/api. All 6 roles can login with Password123!. Auth uses OAuth2PasswordRequestForm (form-encoded, username+password fields). Role enforcement verified: doctor/patient correctly get 403 on /admin/users and /admin/audit-logs. /portal/me works for patient and returns 403 for non-patients. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_medicore_backend.py for regression. Frontend was NOT tested per request.
